checks.name: Reuse atlas-constants; no new domain types
checks.evidence: Only lib-level utilities added (libs/atlas-database/transient.go:28,53; libs/atlas-model/model/processor.go:107; libs/atlas-rest/degrade/degrade.go:25). No new domain/id/classification type.

checks.name: Dockerfile mentions per new direct lib require
checks.evidence: Shared root Dockerfile wires atlas-retry (Dockerfile:43,72,93) + atlas-database (:33,62,92); pgx is third-party via go.sum (libs/atlas-database/go.mod:10); no service gained a new direct atlas-lib require.

checks.name: Kafka producer stubbed in emitting tests
checks.evidence: New httptest tests exercise read-only paths: inventory/resource_test.go:79,101 (GET); login/character/processor_test.go:55,96 (REST read). No emit calls in any changed test.

checks.name: Transient DB errors map to 503 not bare 500
checks.evidence: atlas-inventory/main.go:64-70 registers classifier; changed handlers use server.WriteErrorResponse (inventory/resource.go:45,53,72,79,98; asset/resource.go:34,41,63; compartment/resource.go:41,48,87,94). error.go:48-66 maps transient->503+Retry-After:1.

checks.name: No silent degradation in decorators/enrichment
checks.evidence: InventoryDecorator login/character/processor.go:109-122 and CooldownDecorator skills/skill/processor.go:248-265 use model.ErrDecorator+degrade.Observe; 3 login GetRandomInWorld sites are loud aborts (Errorf+return).

nonBlocking: atlas-skills is DB-backed (main.go:61) but its REST handlers write bare 500 (skill/resource.go:37,55,73,93; macro/resource.go:32) with no classifier registered — out of DOM-26 literal scope (resource.go unchanged) but a fleet-completeness inconsistency.
